response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio matches the scaped Japanese lyrics perfectly (with minor corrections like 'チェンジ' instead of 'ゼンジン' and 'おあんばい' instead of 'アベイラブル'). 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized for disambiguating fast-paced lyrics, and manual transcription was successfully used for the dialogue segment. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timings are strictly anchored to the vocal performance. Continuous lines use instantaneous transitions to avoid cascading delays, and pure instrumentals are left silent.

subtitles.original: あーはいはい
subtitles.english: Ah, yes, yes...

subtitles.original: ごきげんよう
subtitles.english: Good day!

subtitles.original: さあ上々
subtitles.english: Now, in high spirits...

subtitles.original: なかなかの おあんばいで
subtitles.english: quite a good state!

subtitles.original: 隣の部屋
subtitles.english: The next room...

subtitles.original: 相合傘
subtitles.english: sharing an umbrella...

subtitles.original: えぐいのは...
subtitles.english: The shocking part is...

subtitles.original: いや、もう！
subtitles.english: Oh, jeez!

subtitles.original: BPM190で
subtitles.english: At 190 BPM!

subtitles.original: 細密連打
subtitles.english: Meticulous continuous hits...

subtitles.original: デスライフだから
subtitles.english: because it's a tough life!

subtitles.original: たまには年下
subtitles.english: Sometimes a younger one...

subtitles.original: 縮みた小柄な子にしようか
subtitles.english: Shall I choose a petite, small girl?

subtitles.original: ドアを開けたら
subtitles.english: When I opened the door,

subtitles.original: 「新人、バカの娘」
subtitles.english: "A rookie, stupid girl,"

subtitles.original: おいおい どんな
subtitles.english: Hey, hey, what kind of...

subtitles.original: 魔法を使ったってんだよ
subtitles.english: magic did you use?

subtitles.original: デリヘル呼んだら君がいた
subtitles.english: I called a delivery health service, and there you were.

subtitles.original: うつろな目をして立ってたんだ
subtitles.english: You were standing there with hollow eyes.

subtitles.original: あなたの好みのタイプは全部わかっているのよって
subtitles.english: "I know all your favorite types," you said.

subtitles.original: 制服、スク水、真夏のOL
subtitles.english: Uniforms, school swimsuits, midsummer OLs,

subtitles.original: 浴衣、水着、日焼け、全部登場
subtitles.english: yukatas, swimsuits, tan lines, they're all here!

subtitles.original: オプションは頼まない
subtitles.english: No options requested,

subtitles.original: 延長も心外
subtitles.english: and extensions are out of the question!

subtitles.original: いくぞー！
subtitles.english: Here we go!

subtitles.original: せーの！
subtitles.english: Ready, set, go!

subtitles.original: チェンジ！チェンジ！チェンジ！ノーサンキュー！
subtitles.english: Change! Change! Change! No thank you!

subtitles.original: チェンジ！チェンジ！チェンジ！ノーサンキュー！
subtitles.english: Change! Change! Change! No thank you!

subtitles.english: Change! Change! Change! No thank you!

subtitles.original: デリヘル呼んだら君がいた
subtitles.english: I called a delivery health service, and there you were.

subtitles.original: うつろな目をして立ってたんだ
subtitles.english: You were standing there with hollow eyes.

subtitles.original: あなたの好みのタイプになって帰ってきましたって
subtitles.english: "I've returned, having become your favorite type," you said.

subtitles.original: 思い出したくもない笑顔がトラウマとなって住みついた
subtitles.english: That smile, which I don't even want to remember, became a trauma and settled in.

subtitles.original: 哀愁を見い出しだして 絶賛逃亡中
subtitles.english: Seeing the sorrow, I am currently on the run.

subtitles.original: さっ、せーの！
subtitles.english: Now, ready, set, go!

subtitles.original: チェンジ！チェンジ！チェンジ！ノーサンキュー！
subtitles.english: Change! Change! Change! No thank you!

subtitles.original: はぁ、疲れた...
subtitles.english: Sigh, I'm tired...

subtitles.original: 寝るか... いや、寝過ごすな...
subtitles.english: Shall I sleep? No, I shouldn't oversleep...

subtitles.original: ふええ...
subtitles.english: Fuee...

subtitles.original: いや、いいんだよ、プロデューサーの好みとか！
subtitles.english: No, I don't care about the producer's preferences!

subtitles.original: ちょっとちょっと、ケンカしてどうしたの？
subtitles.english: Wait, wait! Why are you fighting?

subtitles.original: あっ、こよちゃん！聞いてよー、プロデューサーのやつが〜！
subtitles.english: Ah, Koyo-chan! Listen to this, that producer guy...!

subtitles.original: うんうん
subtitles.english: Yeah, yeah.

subtitles.original: それで、あいつがさ〜！
subtitles.english: And then, that guy...!

subtitles.original: そうだね〜、ラプちゃん辛かったね〜
subtitles.english: I see~ That must have been tough, Lapu-chan~

subtitles.original: はぁ、ここまで色んなホロメンと絡んできたけど...
subtitles.english: Sigh, I've interacted with various Holo-members up to this point...

subtitles.original: やっぱりこよちゃんが一番だよ！
subtitles.english: ...but Koyo-chan is definitely the best!

subtitles.original: そうだ！今度の吾輩の生誕ライブ一緒に出ようよ！
subtitles.english: I know! Let's perform together in my upcoming birthday live!

subtitles.original: こよちゃんと吾輩にぴったりな曲があるんだ！
subtitles.english: There's a song that's absolutely perfect for you and me!

subtitles.original: ライブの出演ね！スケジュール...確認しておくね〜！
subtitles.english: A live performance, huh? I'll... check my schedule!

subtitles.original: ありがとー！じゃ、またステージで！
subtitles.english: Thank you! Well, see you on stage!

subtitles.original: （俺、このライブが終わったら...君と...）
subtitles.english: (When this live is over... with you...)

subtitles.original: 時計のハリが12から
subtitles.english: As the hands of the clock...

subtitles.original: 12に回るまで
subtitles.english: ...turn from 12 to 12,

subtitles.original: 頭ん中が染められていく
subtitles.english: my head gets completely dyed in...

subtitles.original: ぴんこすてぃっくluv
subtitles.english: Pinkostick Luv.

subtitles.original: すれ違ったり ふと目と目が
subtitles.english: Just passing by each other, or our eyes meeting,

subtitles.original: 交わるだけで
subtitles.english: is all it takes...

subtitles.original: 宙に浮いてる気分になる...
subtitles.english: ...to make me feel like I'm floating in midair.
